display.purpose: Hero wordmark only; Catorze 27 caps, resolves letter by letter on load. Capped at 6rem.

headline.purpose: Section titles, uppercase Catorze, text-wrap balance.

body.purpose: Reading copy in Resamitz serif, sentence case, ~65ch, 75-80% ink.

label.purpose: Nav links, buttons, sub-labels: Catorze caps tracked 0.2em. Kicker variant is Resamitz 0.75rem tracked 0.35em.

shadows.name: raised
shadows.purpose: Soft ambient halo under photographic cards (event offerings, About photo).

shadows.name: floating
shadows.purpose: The legal dialog, lifted off the page.

shadows.name: text-on-photo
shadows.purpose: Keeps Cream and gold text legible over photography.

motion.name: ease-reveal
motion.purpose: Scroll-reveal and image-hover transitions (0.8s reveal, 0.5s hover).

motion.name: ease-out-quint
motion.purpose: Hero load choreography (wordmark stagger, tagline/CTA rise).

components.name: Brand Button (over photo)
components.description: The hero and contact CTA: gold outline over photography, fills solid gold on hover.
components.css: .ds-btn-brand { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; border:1px solid #FAC105; background:transparent; color:#FAC105; padding:12px 28px; border-radius:2px; font-family:'Catorze 27 Medium',Georgia,serif; font-size:0.875rem; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.2em; text-decoration:none; transition:background .2s,color .2s; cursor:pointer; } .ds-btn-brand:hover { background:#FAC105; color:#10140F; } .ds-btn-brand:focus-visible { outline:2px solid #FAC105; outline-offset:2px; }

components.name: Solid Button
components.description: The loudest action: filled gold with a dark label, deepens on hover.
components.css: .ds-btn-solid { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; border:1px solid #FAC105; background:#FAC105; color:#10140F; padding:12px 28px; border-radius:2px; font-family:'Catorze 27 Medium',Georgia,serif; font-size:0.875rem; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.2em; transition:background .2s,border-color .2s; cursor:pointer; } .ds-btn-solid:hover { background:#C89A04; border-color:#C89A04; } .ds-btn-solid:focus-visible { outline:2px solid #FAC105; outline-offset:2px; }

components.name: Outline Button
components.description: Quiet secondary action: faint gold outline, fills gold on hover.
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; border:1px solid rgba(250,193,5,0.5); background:transparent; color:#FAC105; padding:12px 28px; border-radius:2px; font-family:'Catorze 27 Medium',Georgia,serif; font-size:0.875rem; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.2em; transition:background .2s,border-color .2s,color .2s; cursor:pointer; } .ds-btn-outline:hover { background:#FAC105; border-color:#FAC105; color:#10140F; } .ds-btn-outline:focus-visible { outline:2px solid #FAC105; outline-offset:2px; }

components.name: Nav Link
components.description: Top-bar anchor in Catorze caps; active section shows a thin sliding gold underline.
components.css: .ds-nav-link { position:relative; display:inline-flex; align-items:center; min-height:44px; color:#FAC105; font-family:'Catorze 27 Medium',Georgia,serif; font-size:0.875rem; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.2em; text-decoration:none; transition:color .2s; } .ds-nav-link:hover { color:#FEF9E6; } .ds-nav-link[aria-current]::after { content:''; position:absolute; bottom:8px; left:50%; transform:translateX(-50%); width:20px; height:1px; background:currentColor; }

components.name: Event Card
components.description: Image-topped offering card on Shelf with a hairline border and ambient halo.
components.html:
Gin Tastings

A guided journey through the world of gin.
components.css: .ds-card { display:flex; flex-direction:column; overflow:hidden; border:1px solid rgba(69,87,66,0.6); background:#171D16; border-radius:2px; box-shadow:0 0 5px 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.1); } .ds-card-media { aspect-ratio:16/10; background:linear-gradient(135deg,#2E3A2C,#171D16); } .ds-card-body { padding:32px; } .ds-card-title { margin:0; font-family:'Catorze 27 Medium',Georgia,serif; font-size:1.5rem; line-height:1.05; text-transform:uppercase; color:#F1F4F0; } .ds-card-text { margin:16px 0 0; font-family:Resamitz,Georgia,serif; line-height:1.625; color:rgba(241,244,240,0.75); }

components.name: Language Toggle
components.description: DE/EN segmented switch; active language is a solid gold chip.
components.css: .ds-toggle { display:inline-flex; border:1px solid rgba(250,193,5,0.5); border-radius:2px; } .ds-toggle button { min-height:44px; padding:0 12px; background:transparent; color:rgba(250,193,5,0.7); border:none; font-family:'Catorze 27 Medium',Georgia,serif; font-size:0.7rem; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.2em; cursor:pointer; transition:color .2s,background .2s; } .ds-toggle button:hover { color:#FAC105; } .ds-toggle button[aria-pressed="true"] { background:#FAC105; color:#10140F; }

components.name: Kicker Label
components.description: The single tracked eyebrow above the About heading (used once, brand-wide).

narrative.overview: Near-black warm-olive surfaces, a single gold light source, rows of bottles standing like spines on a shelf. This is a bar you read a drink in, not just order one. The system is built to feel crafted and precise first: every edge is sharp, every label is set in condensed caps, and the gold accent behaves like gilding on a book cover, rare and deliberate, never a wash. The ground is a warm olive-tinted near-black (#10140F), never pure black, lit by one saturated gold (#FAC105). Two self-hosted serifs do the talking: a condensed display face (Catorze 27) in uppercase for headings and labels, and a quieter reading serif (Resamitz) for body. Photography carries the mood; type and color frame it. It is not a loud nightclub, not corporate-SaaS clean, not the generic restaurant template, and not rustic-farmhouse warm.
keyCharacteristics: Gold (#FAC105) used as rare light, never a flood.
Two self-hosted serifs: condensed display caps + a sentence-case reading serif.
Real photography carries the mood; type frames it.
Choreographed first load, restrained scroll reveals; fully neutralized under reduced-motion.

rules.name: The Single Candle Rule
rules.body: Gold is a highlight, not a surface. One gold light source per view, on labels, a heading accent, or a CTA, never spread as a background wash.

rules.name: The Warm Near-Black Rule
rules.body: The ground is warm olive-tinted near-black (#10140F). Pure #000 and cool greys are forbidden.

rules.name: The Cream-Over-Photo Rule
rules.body: Text on photography uses Cream (#FEF9E6), not Candle White. Cream carries the candlelit warmth.

rules.name: The Caps-for-Headings Rule
rules.body: Condensed display caps (Catorze) are for headings and short labels only. Body copy is always sentence-case Resamitz. All-caps body is forbidden.

rules.name: The One Kicker Rule
rules.body: The tracked uppercase eyebrow appears exactly once, above the About heading. It is never repeated above every section.

rules.name: The Flat-Until-Photo Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest; depth is tonal (bg to surface to elevated). A real shadow is permitted only over a photograph or for a lifted modal.

dos: Do keep the ground warm near-black (#10140F); reach for Shelf (#171D16) and Raised Oak (#2E3A2C) for layering, never #000.
Do treat gold (#FAC105) as a single candle: labels, one heading accent, one CTA per view.
Do set headings and labels in Catorze caps and body in sentence-case Resamitz.
Do keep every corner at 2px and every card border a full hairline.
Do let real photography carry the mood; frame it with type and gold rather than competing with it.
Do use Cream (#FEF9E6) for text over photos and Candle White (#F1F4F0) on solid dark sections.
Do keep all motion enhancement-only: content visible by default, fully neutralized under prefers-reduced-motion.
donts: Don't drift toward a loud nightclub: no neon, no high-saturation party palette, no club-flyer energy.
Don't drift toward corporate-SaaS clean: no Inter or geometric sans, no blue accents, no flat icon-card grids.
Don't ship the generic restaurant template: stock hero over identical icon-heading-text cards in a default Google serif.
Don't go rustic-farmhouse: no cream paper, kraft, hand-drawn, or cozy-cafe warmth.
Don't spread gold as a background wash or push it past a CTA-and-labels share of any screen.
Don't repeat the tracked eyebrow kicker above every section; it appears once.
Don't set body copy in all-caps, and never use gradient-filled text; the hero highlight is a masked sheen over a single solid color.
Don't add a colored border-left/border-right stripe to cards or callouts; full hairline borders only.
Don't add decorative shadows or glassmorphism; surfaces are flat until they sit over a photo.
